evidence.framing: Agy/Gemini 3.1 Pro High PASS: twentieth-century resistance songs are framed through a decolonial lens; Soviet criminalization and Russian-imperial erasure rejected; USS and UPA layers kept distinct; no uncritical hagiography.
evidence.note: Agy/Gemini 3.1 Pro High: academic, respectful folklore-seminar tone; natural prose without repetition; elegant analysis of poetic devices, elegiac repetition, and variant circulation.
evidence.pedagogy: Agy/Gemini 3.1 Pro High: strong CBI alignment; source -> genre layer -> poetic evidence -> limits of inference pattern; activities teach variant comparison, motif analysis, disciplined performance, and research ethics.
evidence.quote_integrity: Agy/Gemini 3.1 Pro High: hosted readings and references map cleanly to public-domain Ukrlib and public reference pages without internal corpus IDs; textual citations are clean and accurate.
